body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Fixes these warnings:
```julia

┌ Warning: Generated HTML over size_threshold_warn limit: generated/calibration/perfect_model_site_level_calibration.md
│     Generated file size: 301.47 (KiB)
│     size_threshold_warn: 292.97 (KiB)
│     size_threshold:      488.28 (KiB)
│     HTML file:           generated/calibration/perfect_model_site_level_calibration/index.html
└ @ Documenter.HTMLWriter ~/.julia/packages/Documenter/eoWm2/src/html/HTMLWriter.jl:1906
┌ Warning: Generated HTML over size_threshold_warn limit: generated/standalone/Canopy/canopy_tutorial.md
│     Generated file size: 449.29 (KiB)
│     size_threshold_warn: 292.97 (KiB)
│     size_threshold:      488.28 (KiB)
│     HTML file:           generated/standalone/Canopy/canopy_tutorial/index.html
└ @ Documenter.HTMLWriter ~/.julia/packages/Documenter/eoWm2/src/html/HTMLWriter.jl:1906
┌ Warning: Generated HTML over size_threshold_warn limit: generated/calibration/obs_site_level_calibration.md
│     Generated file size: 448.78 (KiB)
│     size_threshold_warn: 292.97 (KiB)
│     size_threshold:      488.28 (KiB)
│     HTML file:           generated/calibration/obs_site_level_calibration/index.html
└ @ Documenter.HTMLWriter ~/.julia/packages/Documenter/eoWm2/src/html/HTMLWriter.jl:1906
```

Images shown with Makie make the generated markdown
files large. Supress repl output of some model setup.
Fix conflicting identifier warning
Split API docs up.
Reduce fdocumenter ile threshold size back to default

title: Reduce generated tutorial markdown sizes
